Administer.name: Administer
Administer.description: Handle bureaucracy, organizations, logistics, legal process, and formal systems.

Connect.name: Connect
Connect.description: Find people, favors, contacts, and useful introductions in a social network.

Exert.name: Exert
Exert.description: Climb, swim, run, lift, jump, endure exertion, and perform demanding physical work.

Fix.name: Fix
Fix.description: Repair, sabotage, jury-rig, maintain, and understand machines or technical hardware.

Heal.name: Heal
Heal.description: Stabilize injuries, treat disease, use medical gear, and understand biological hazards.

Know.name: Know
Know.description: Recall facts, reason from education, research records, and understand academic fields.

Lead.name: Lead
Lead.description: Command groups, manage morale, coordinate crews, and impose discipline under stress.

Notice.name: Notice
Notice.description: Spot ambushes, read details, detect hidden threats, and stay aware under pressure.

Perform.name: Perform
Perform.description: Create, entertain, persuade through art, and handle performance-facing work.

Pilot.name: Pilot
Pilot.description: Fly, drive, dock, evade, and operate vehicles or spacecraft under difficult conditions.

Program.name: Program
Program.description: Write code, breach systems, handle security, and understand digital infrastructure.

Punch.name: Punch
Punch.description: Fight unarmed, grapple, brawl, and use natural weapons or close body leverage.

Shoot.name: Shoot
Shoot.description: Use ranged weapons, handle firefights, aim under stress, and judge firing conditions.

Sneak.name: Sneak
Sneak.description: Move quietly, hide, infiltrate, conceal objects, and bypass attention.

Stab.name: Stab
Stab.description: Fight with melee weapons, thrown weapons, close weapons, and direct violence.

Survive.name: Survive
Survive.description: Navigate hostile terrain, forage, handle wilderness threats, and endure exposure.

Talk.name: Talk
Talk.description: Persuade, deceive, negotiate, read a conversation, and handle direct social pressure.

Trade.name: Trade
Trade.description: Buy, sell, appraise, haggle, evaluate markets, and manage commercial deals.

Work.name: Work
Work.description: Practice a profession, craft, labor specialty, or practical civilian trade.
